title: We Can Source It Ltd - Recyclable Straws - Light Blue and White Striped Paper Straws - Biodegradable - for Cocktails, Tumblers - Drinking, Birthday Party, Christmas Party Dessert Straws- 8" Set of 250
description: Product Description AVAILABLE IN These disposable white paper straws come unwrapped, ensuring hassle-free placement in the dispenser box. 5.5 inch 8 inch PAPER DRINKING STRAWS With White, Black & Stripe paper and kraft paper straws These durable and sturdy paper drinking straws are crafted from premium quality paper that copes well with liquid and lasts for hours in beverages without getting soggy. FEATURES: These paper straws are thick. They are completely food safe. They are completely reusable. Simple use and throw away. ENVIRONMENTAL STRAWS These reusable straws are fully leak-proof, a beverage accessory that can be used in a tumbler, cocktail glass or a glass of juice. COMPLETELY DURABLE These paper straws have a thick coating that makes them durable enough to last for hours in liquids SUITABLE FOR HOT & COLD The paper straws have been tested to be suitable for use in both hot and cold cocktails. Perfect for those warming Christmas drinks or cooling summer spritzes!
